title: The Fnaf Plushie Mod
description: a simple mod that adds the iconic plushies from the fnaf franchise
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d1154cf3e6d9ef0bddbecddc074cae5d2a1a60.png)

This minecraft mod aims to add the plushies from the five nights at freddys franchise along with some extra features to make it more enjoyable to use.

**Some features this mod has are:

New plushie maker villager that you can buy the plushies from

120 new plushies based off of characters from the five nights at freddy universe**

a custom animation when you right click the plushies


** ALL NEW FEATURES/FIXES ARE ONLY ONE 1.20.1 

NO BEDROCK PORTS PLEASE

FABRIC WILL NOT BE UPDATED
**
credit to 8shadowscrow8 for the amazing models you can find the texture pack [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fnaf-ultimate-custom-plushie)

this mod adds 121 plushies from the iconic "five nights at Freddy's"  franchise by Scott Cawthon
